name: sprintra
description: Persistent project memory for Claude Code with full session-recovery loop. SessionStart auto-injects a compact briefing, PostToolUse captures every Claude Code tool call (project + user scoped), Stop summarizes the session, SessionEnd cleans up. Survives Ctrl+C and reconnect — pick up exactly where you left off. Includes 6 PM workflow skills and the Sprintra MCP server (17 consolidated tools).
